FAQ

Common questions

Do I need a paid TradingView account?
A free account covers the basics. To use all alert features and the Pine Script indicators fully, a TradingView Pro plan is recommended.
How do I get access to the Pine Script indicators?
After enrollment, you'll receive an invite-only access link to both scripts on TradingView. Only enrolled students receive this access.
When is the live Q&A?
The Q&A date is shared after enrollment. The session is also recorded, so you have permanent access whether or not you attend live.
What markets does this strategy cover?
The strategy is optimized for gold (XAUUSD) and forex pairs — the same markets Voula trades with publicly verified results.
Is there a refund policy?
Please reach out directly before enrolling with any questions. Voula is happy to answer your questions to make sure the course is the right fit for you.

The experience

Six days of immersive trading — in one of Greece's most beautiful islands.

This is not a classroom. You stay in my home, eat with me, trade beside me every morning — and watch exactly how I approach the markets in real time.
